title: Zcash's Ironwood Upgrade Set for July: What You Need to Know
summary: Zcash has finalized its Ironwood upgrade, which will introduce a new shielded pool and ensure the supply of ZEC remains bounded. The upgrade is scheduled to activate in July 2026.
body:
Zcash has confirmed the details of its upcoming Ironwood upgrade, which is set to go live in July 2026. This upgrade includes a new shielded pool, designed to enhance privacy for Zcash users. Additionally, it ensures that the circulating supply of ZEC (Zcash's native cryptocurrency) will remain bounded, addressing concerns about potential inflation.

The Ironwood upgrade is part of Zcash's ongoing efforts to improve its privacy features and maintain a stable supply. The new shielded pool will allow users to transact with greater anonymity, a key feature for those prioritizing financial privacy. This upgrade follows a thorough review and testing process to ensure its security and functionality.

For everyday users, this upgrade means better privacy protections and a more stable economic model for ZEC. The bounded supply ensures that the value of ZEC is not diluted over time, which could be beneficial for long-term holders. The new shielded pool will also make it easier for users to keep their transactions private, which is particularly important in an increasingly surveillance-heavy financial landscape.

The Zcash community and developers have been working diligently to prepare for this upgrade. Users are advised to stay informed about the activation date and any preparatory steps they may need to take. Keep an eye on official Zcash channels for updates and instructions on how to ensure a smooth transition.

The Ironwood upgrade enhances Zcash's privacy features with a new shielded pool, allowing users to transact with greater anonymity. This upgrade also ensures the circulating supply of ZEC will remain stable, benefiting long-term holders.

If you use Zcash, stay tuned for the July activation and any preparatory steps. This upgrade could significantly improve your privacy and the stability of ZEC. Read more → https://www.cryptocatalyst.news/articles/2026-06-09-zcashs-ironwood-upgrade-set-for-july-what-you-need-to-know
